new_repo.github_remote_first_policy: Always check GitHub remote state before relying on local cache. Run git fetch origin before any status assessment.

donor_repo.name: bthwani-suite

donor_repo.policy: NEVER modify the donor repo. Read for analysis and extraction only.

no_donor_mutation_policy: NEVER write to or modify the donor repo. It is read-only analysis source.

DONOR_SCREENS_EXTRACTED_FOR_REFERENCE.note: Every listed donor screen inherits REFERENCE_ONLY unless a topic_mappings record explicitly narrows its accepted value. Donor material never establishes implementation readiness.
